name: spec-flow-ui
description: SaaS multi-tenant do spec-flow: frontend React (client) + backend Express em Lambda (server, DynamoDB + GitHub App + Cognito), tipos compartilhados (shared) e IaC CDK (infra). Toda integração com o GitHub vive no backend.

scripts.typecheck: npm -w shared run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w infra run typecheck
